overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character walking through a foggy, neon-lit urban environment at night. The character traverses a commercial sidewalk, passes under an overpass, walks alongside a fenced highway, and crosses a street intersection with towering skyscrapers and holographic advertisements visible through the haze.

scene_state.functional_zone: commercial sidewalk with neon signage and planters

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the sidewalk past concrete planters and benches, approaching an overpass

notable_agents.action: pedestrian walking ahead on the sidewalk in the same direction

entered.detail: large curved neon sign with green and pink illumination reading 'Dancing'
circular concrete planter containing a small palm tree
wooden and metal park bench along the sidewalk
modern glass and steel commercial building with illuminated interior

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a foggy cyberpunk city sidewalk at night, dominated by a vibrant neon sign on the left. The character walks past circular concrete planters and benches while following a pedestrian ahead. The area is semi-covered by building overhangs, creating a sheltered environment with mixed neon and ambient lighting.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered walkway under transit overpass with concrete barriers

events.description: moves from open commercial sidewalk into covered area beneath concrete overpass

agents.ego_description: continuing forward under the overpass, passing red and white concrete barriers

notable_agents.action: pedestrian walking ahead wearing dark clothing and backpack

entered.detail: red and white striped concrete Jersey barriers lining the walkway
massive concrete transit overpass with support columns overhead
tall chain-link fence with barbed wire topping appearing in the distance

segments.scene_description: The character transitions into a covered walkway beneath a massive concrete overpass. Red and white barriers line the right side while the lighting shifts to warmer artificial tones. The neon signs of the commercial district fade behind as the environment becomes more industrial and enclosed.

events.description: approaching intersection with traffic lights and waiting vehicles visible ahead

agents.ego_description: walking along the fenced sidewalk, approaching an intersection with other pedestrians

notable_agents.action: pedestrian with blonde hair and yellow jacket walking ahead toward the intersection

entered.detail: tall industrial chain-link fence topped with barbed wire running parallel to the sidewalk
metal guardrail separating sidewalk from multi-lane road
large colorful holographic advertisement floating above the street

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a narrow sidewalk enclosed by a tall barbed-wire fence on the left and a highway guardrail on the right. The foggy atmosphere persists with streetlights casting an orange glow. A holographic billboard becomes visible in the distance as the character approaches a traffic intersection.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban intersection with crosswalk and holographic advertisements

events.description: character steps onto yellow-striped crosswalk and begins crossing the multi-lane street
camera pans upward to look at towering skyscrapers and holographic billboards above

agents.ego_description: crossing the street at the crosswalk then looking up at the surrounding skyscrapers

notable_agents.action: white sedan driving through the intersection with headlights on

entered.detail: broad yellow and black striped pedestrian crosswalk markings
tall modern glass skyscrapers with illuminated windows rising into the fog
overhead traffic signal gantry with green light illuminated

segments.scene_description: The character enters a wide urban intersection, crossing yellow-striped crosswalks while vehicles pass by. The camera pans upward to reveal massive skyscrapers and towering holographic advertisements piercing through the orange haze. The environment opens up completely, showcasing the vertical scale of the cyberpunk cityscape.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a neon-lit urban corridor that gradually opens into a towering, holographic cityscape. It begins on a foggy sidewalk beneath building overhangs, moving past vibrant neon signs and concrete planters while following a pedestrian. As the character advances, the scene shifts into a sheltered, industrial walkway beneath a massive concrete overpass where the lighting turns warmer and the commercial signs fade. The path then narrows into a corridor enclosed by a barbed-wire fence and highway guardrail, with streetlights casting an orange glow through the haze before a distant holographic billboard appears. Finally, the environment expands completely as the character crosses a wide intersection, with the camera panning upward to reveal massive skyscrapers and towering advertisements piercing the foggy sky.
